The Devil’s Rejects (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $17,044,981Details
International Box Office $3,895,447
Worldwide Box Office $20,940,428
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,067,335 (41.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.41 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:81.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$7,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,757 opening theaters/1,757 max. theaters, 3.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $31,803,111

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 22nd, 2005 (Wide) by Lionsgate, released as The Devil's Rejects
October 6th, 2025 (Special Engagement) by Fathom Events
Video Release: November 8th, 2005 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for sadistic violence, strong sexual content, language and drug use.
Running Time: 115 minutes
Franchise: House of 1,000 Corpses
Plot point: Bounty Hunter, Corrupt Cops, Dysfunctional Family, Fugitive / On the Run
Subgenre: Slasher Horror
Time period setting: 1970s
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States, Germany
Languages: English, Spanish
